email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature Digital Marketing Specialist bij Orac. Uw oproep voor iemand die data en design combineert, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik zelfstandig on-page SEO, keyword-gerichte content en WordPress-beheer uit voor klantwebsites. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data, entity-optimalisatie en GEO toegepast om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik ben analytisch, nieuwsgierig en werk graag met tools zoals Google Analytics, SEMrush en Ahrefs.

Wat mij aanspreekt in deze functie is de focus op de volledige klantreis: van koude acquisitie tot klantactivatie. Ik wil graag groeien in het analyseren van klantdata, segmenteren en het inzetten van AI om commerciële inzichten te vertalen naar acties. Uw aanbod van Salesforce Marketing Cloud en een solide tech stack biedt precies de omgeving waarin ik me verder wil ontwikkelen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel voor hybride werken in Oostende.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

With great enthusiasm I apply for the Digital Marketing Specialist position at Orac. Your call for someone who combines data and design aligns perfectly with my profile.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I independently handle on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and WordPress management for client websites. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data, entity optimization, and GEO to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am analytical, curious, and comfortable with tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs.

What appeals to me in this role is the focus on the full customer journey: from cold acquisition to customer activation. I want to grow in analyzing customer data, segmenting, and using AI to translate commercial insights into actions. Your offer of Salesforce Marketing Cloud and a solid tech stack provides exactly the environment where I can further develop.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible for hybrid work in Ostend.

I would be happy to explain my motivation in a conversation.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature Digital Marketing Specialist bij Orac. Uw oproep voor iemand die data en design combineert, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik zelfstandig on-page SEO, keyword-gerichte content en WordPress-beheer uit voor klantwebsites. Ik optimaliseer zichtbaarheid via SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD), entity-optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) toegepast om vindbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Dit sluit aan bij uw vraag naar een AI-mindset.

Wat mij aanspreekt in deze functie is de focus op de volledige klantreis: van koude acquisitie tot klantactivatie. Ik wil graag groeien in het analyseren van klantdata, segmenteren en het identificeren van churn-signalen. Uw vermelding van Salesforce Marketing Cloud en AI-tools spreekt mij aan, omdat ik geloof dat data het verhaal vertelt dat commerciële impact mogelijk maakt. Ik ben analytisch, nieuwsgierig en niet bang om vragen te stellen als cijfers niet kloppen.

Hoewel ik nog aan het begin van mijn carrière sta, heb ik een technische basis in webontwikkeling en een bewezen vermogen om snel nieuwe tools eigen te maken. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel voor hybride werken in Oostende.

Ik zou graag mijn motivatie en ervaring toelichten in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

With great enthusiasm I apply for the Digital Marketing Specialist position at Orac. Your call for someone who combines data and design aligns perfectly with my profile and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I independently handle on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and WordPress management for client websites. I optimize visibility using SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I applied structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to improve findability in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This matches your request for an AI mindset.

What appeals to me in this role is the focus on the full customer journey: from cold acquisition to customer activation. I want to grow in analyzing customer data, segmenting, and identifying churn signals. Your mention of Salesforce Marketing Cloud and AI tools appeals to me, because I believe data tells the story that enables commercial impact. I am analytical, curious, and not afraid to ask questions when numbers don't add up.

Although I am at the start of my career, I have a technical foundation in web development and a proven ability to quickly master new tools. I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible for hybrid work in Ostend.

I would be happy to explain my motivation and experience in a personal conversation.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Hands-on experience running performance campaigns (SEO/SEA) and tracking ROI with Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Ads
• Strong analytical and data-driven mindset: technical SEO audits, structured data, entity optimization, and GEO for AI search visibility
• Proficient with AI tools for analysis and content creation, actively using them to work faster and smarter
• Experience with full lead journey: from cold acquisition (SEO content, campaigns) to nurturing and conversion via WordPress and CRM data
• B1 Dutch (actively improving), fluent English, and based in Zwijndrecht (near Antwerp) with flexibility for hybrid work in Ostend
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
